'''Hydrobikes''' were a popular method of transportation on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]]. They were especially common near coastal areas such as [[Phyrstal Island]] and [[Le Yer]], as they could be bought or lent from either of these cities.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
